arguments.argument:
set -e JDK_TAR="${project.build.directory}/jdk-aarch64.tar.gz" JDK_DIR="${project.build.directory}/jdk-aarch64" JDK_URL="https://github.com/adoptium/temurin21-binaries/releases/download/jdk-21.0.6%2B7/OpenJDK21U-jdk_aarch64_mac_hotspot_21.0.6_7.tar.gz"
mkdir -p "$JDK_DIR" if [ ! -f "$JDK_TAR" ]; then echo "[jpackage] downloading Temurin 21 aarch64..." curl -fsSL "$JDK_URL" -o "$JDK_TAR" fi if [ ! -f "$JDK_DIR/Contents/Home/bin/java" ]; then echo "[jpackage] extracting aarch64 JDK..." tar -xzf "$JDK_TAR" -C "$JDK_DIR" --strip-components=1 fi
STAGING="${project.build.directory}/jpackage-input-arm64" mkdir -p "$STAGING" cp "${project.build.directory}/SynthPi-${project.version}-boxed.jar" "$STAGING/"
DEST="${project.basedir}/dist/arm64" mkdir -p "$DEST" rm -f "$DEST/SynthPi.dmg"
APP_VERSION="${project.version}" APP_VERSION="${APP_VERSION%-SNAPSHOT}"
echo "[jpackage] building SynthPi.dmg (arm64)..." "$JDK_DIR/Contents/Home/bin/jpackage" \ --type dmg \ --name SynthPi \ --input "$STAGING" \ --main-jar "SynthPi-${project.version}-boxed.jar" \ --runtime-image "$JDK_DIR/Contents/Home" \ --dest "$DEST" \ --app-version "$APP_VERSION" \ --icon "${project.basedir}/src/main/resources/SynthPi.icns" \ --java-options "-Xmx512m" echo "[jpackage] done: dist/arm64/SynthPi.dmg"

set -e JDK_TAR="${project.build.directory}/jdk-x64.tar.gz" JDK_DIR="${project.build.directory}/jdk-x64" JDK_URL="https://github.com/adoptium/temurin21-binaries/releases/download/jdk-21.0.6%2B7/OpenJDK21U-jdk_x64_mac_hotspot_21.0.6_7.tar.gz"
mkdir -p "$JDK_DIR" if [ ! -f "$JDK_TAR" ]; then echo "[jpackage] downloading Temurin 21 x64..." curl -fsSL "$JDK_URL" -o "$JDK_TAR" fi if [ ! -f "$JDK_DIR/Contents/Home/bin/java" ]; then echo "[jpackage] extracting x64 JDK..." tar -xzf "$JDK_TAR" -C "$JDK_DIR" --strip-components=1 fi
STAGING="${project.build.directory}/jpackage-input-x64" mkdir -p "$STAGING" cp "${project.build.directory}/SynthPi-${project.version}-boxed.jar" "$STAGING/"
DEST="${project.basedir}/dist/x64" mkdir -p "$DEST" rm -f "$DEST/SynthPi.dmg"
APP_VERSION="${project.version}" APP_VERSION="${APP_VERSION%-SNAPSHOT}"
echo "[jpackage] building SynthPi.dmg (x64)..." arch -x86_64 "$JDK_DIR/Contents/Home/bin/jpackage" \ --type dmg \ --name SynthPi \ --input "$STAGING" \ --main-jar "SynthPi-${project.version}-boxed.jar" \ --runtime-image "$JDK_DIR/Contents/Home" \ --dest "$DEST" \ --app-version "$APP_VERSION" \ --icon "${project.basedir}/src/main/resources/SynthPi.icns" \ --java-options "-Xmx512m" echo "[jpackage] done: dist/x64/SynthPi.dmg"
